channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年7月21日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Corners Don't Look Like That: Regarding Screenspace Ambient Occlusion #2 Hacker wipes Romania's land registry database #3 We're Squandering LEDs' Potential to Save Our Night Skies #4 Kimi K3, Qwen 3.8, and Anthropic's (Potential) Unravelling #5 Airport Simulator #6 Perfection Is Not Over-Engineering #7 Firefox Merges Support for Vulkan Video Decoding #8 Jaron Lanier: there is no AI (2023) #9 ECC and DDR5 #10 Exploit brokers pay $500k for WordPress RCEs. I found one with GPT5.6 and $25

item.title: 2026年7月20日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Minecraft: Java Edition now uses SDL3 #2 What I learned selling 2,500 MIDI recorders: Hardware is not so hard #3 Blender 5.2 LTS #4 The death and rebirth of my home server #5 OpenAI reduces Codex Model Context Size from 372k to 272k #6 DRIVE – Operational Excellence for AI-accelerated engineering #7 Bananas sprout in Rayleigh Garden UK after 15 years #8 Transcribe.cpp #9 I joined the IndieWeb, here's what I learned #10 Infinities, impossibilities, and the man in the white linen suit
